task_completion.description: Verify that a new block named 'Travel Preferences' is created in the Contacts module layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A section or block titled 'Travel Preferences' is visible in the Contacts module layout editor.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Date field labeled 'Passport Expiry' is added to the 'Travel Preferences' block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A field labeled 'Passport Expiry' is visible under the 'Travel Preferences' block. During creation or in the layout, it should be identifiable as a Date field.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Text field labeled 'Frequent Flyer Number' is added to the 'Travel Preferences' block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A field labeled 'Frequent Flyer Number' is visible under the 'Travel Preferences' block. During creation or in the layout, it should be identifiable as a Text/String field.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Picklist field labeled 'Preferred Seating' is added with the correct values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A field labeled 'Preferred Seating' is visible under the 'Travel Preferences' block. A field creation modal or picklist editor should show the exact values: 'Window', 'Aisle', and 'No Preference'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Picklist field labeled 'Dietary Restrictions' is added with the correct values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A field labeled 'Dietary Restrictions' is visible under the 'Travel Preferences' block. A field creation modal or picklist editor should show the exact values: 'None', 'Vegetarian', 'Vegan', 'Halal', 'Kosher', and 'Gluten-Free'.

task_completion.description: Verify that all layout changes have been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the layout was saved, or the layout editor showing the final state with all new fields and blocks present without unsaved indicators.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the CRM's web GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Vtiger CRM web interface (e.g., clicking 'Add Block', 'Add Custom Field', and 'Save'), rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual Vtiger CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the genuine Vtiger CRM layout editor, not a text editor, mockup, or unrelated application.

integrity.description: Verify that the changes were made legitimately and not by altering the DOM.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer tools open showing DOM manipulation to fake the presence of the new block or fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Contacts module layout must include a new block named 'Travel Preferences'. Within this block, there must be four specific fields: 'Passport Expiry' (Date type), 'Frequent Flyer Number' (Text type), 'Preferred Seating' (Picklist type with exact values: Window, Aisle, No Preference), and 'Dietary Restrictions' (Picklist type with exact values: None, Vegetarian, Vegan, Halal, Kosher, Gluten-Free). All changes must be saved in the CRM layout editor.
